summary.what_built: This module manages the stopping state UI for control buttons.
summary.problem: It solves the issue of control buttons not reflecting the stopping state correctly.
summary.risk: The risk level is critical because incorrect UI behavior could confuse users during trading.
summary.validation: The code was checked for syntax and basic functionality and passed those checks.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new UI management module will be integrated into the existing system.
summary.uncertainty: The exact behavior of the UI under various stopping conditions is not fully tested, so watch for any discrepancies.
